videocodebatchestable.title: Video Code Batches
videocodebatchestable.description: Manage anonymous access code batches for video code courses.
videocodebatchestable.courseFilterLocked: Course filter locked to this course
videocodebatchestable.noVideosForCourse: No videos found for this course
videocodebatchestable.noBatchesDescription: Create the first batch for a video code course to start managing exports and redemptions.

videocodebatchdetailspage.loadFailed: The requested batch could not be loaded.
videocodebatchdetailspage.noExportsDescription: CSV and PDF exports will appear here after the first export.
videocodebatchdetailspage.noRecentRedemptionsDescription: Recent redemption activity from the statistics endpoint will appear here.
videocodebatchdetailspage.noRedemptionsDescription: Redemptions will appear here once students start redeeming codes from this batch.

createvideocodebatchdialog.title: Create Video Code Batch
createvideocodebatchdialog.description: Generate a new batch of anonymous video access codes for a video code course.
createvideocodebatchdialog.noVideosForCourse: No videos found for this course
createvideocodebatchdialog.batchLifecycleDescription: Export the generated codes, sell them offline, then close the batch with the confirmed sold count for invoicing.

errors.selectCourse: Select a video code course before creating a batch.
errors.selectVideo: Select a video before creating a batch.
errors.maxQuantityExceeded: Quantity must not be greater than {count}.
errors.invalidViewLimit: View limit per code must be at least 1.
errors.maxViewLimitExceeded: View limit per code must not be greater than {count}.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create video code batch.

closevideocodebatchdialog.description: Confirm how many codes were actually sold. Unsold codes will stop being redeemable once the sold limit is enforced.
closevideocodebatchdialog.moreCodesRedeemable: more codes can still be redeemed, and
closevideocodebatchdialog.confirmSoldCount: I confirm the sold count is correct.

errors.invalidSoldLimit: Sold limit must be a valid number.
errors.soldLimitBelowRedeemed: Sold limit cannot be lower than the redeemed count ({count}).
errors.soldLimitExceedsQuantity: Sold limit cannot exceed the batch quantity ({count}).
errors.confirmSoldCount: Confirm the sold count before saving.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to update the sold limit.

expandvideocodebatchdialog.title: Expand Batch
expandvideocodebatchdialog.description: Add more codes to the current open batch without starting a new batch.
expandvideocodebatchdialog.newCodesNote: . New codes can be exported after the batch is expanded.

errors.invalidAdditionalQuantity: Additional quantity must be at least 1.
errors.expandFailed: Failed to expand video code batch.

sendvideocodebatchwhatsappcsvdialog.title: Send CSV to WhatsApp
sendvideocodebatchwhatsappcsvdialog.description: Send a CSV export for this batch directly to a WhatsApp number.

errors.invalidCountryCode: Enter a valid country code such as +20.
errors.invalidEgyptPhone: Enter an Egyptian mobile number in 11-digit local format, for example 01001234567.
errors.invalidStartSequence: Start sequence must be at least 1.
errors.invalidEndSequence: End sequence must be greater than or equal to start sequence.
errors.endExceedsQuantity: End sequence cannot exceed the batch quantity ({count}).

videocodebatches.title: Video Code Batches
videocodebatches.description: Generate, export, expand, and close anonymous video access code batches for this center.
